brand.name: Best Headshots In Atlanta
brand.tagline: What we all want is to be photogenic

offer.what: On-location professional headshot photography sessions in the Atlanta metro area (also operates as 2BePhotogenic / Richard Greenwood Photography)
offer.coreOutcome: A polished, confidence-inspiring professional image that makes clients look their best on LinkedIn, resumes, company websites, and casting portfolios
offer.pricePoint: ~$250 per session (basic package: up to 200 proofs, 5 fully retouched images); additional retouched images available
offer.commitment: One-off per session; no subscription or retainer

audience.icp: Business professionals, job seekers, and corporate employees in the Atlanta metro area seeking updated LinkedIn and corporate headshots
painPoints: Looking unphotogenic or stiff in photos
Outdated or amateur-looking LinkedIn and company profile photos
Not knowing how to pose or present themselves professionally
Feeling self-conscious or awkward in front of a camera
Unsure if a professional headshot is worth the investment
segments: Corporate professionals and executives needing company directory or LinkedIn photos
Job seekers and career changers updating their professional brand
Actors, models, and performers needing casting headshots
Entrepreneurs and small business owners building personal brands

salesCycle.length: same day to a few days (inquiry → book → shoot → deliver)
salesCycle.trial: None; booking is direct with no free trial or consult
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Inquiry via Thumbtack, Zenfolio contact form, or phone; session booked and paid per appointment; payment via Cash, Check, PayPal, Venmo, or Zelle
salesCycle.topObjection: Price sensitivity — unsure if a professional headshot justifies the cost vs. a smartphone photo

ahaMoment: Receiving the final retouched images and seeing how professional and polished you look — typically delivered within days of the session

retention.recurring: Low by default — sessions are one-off; repeat bookings happen only when the client changes jobs, updates their look, or needs new material
retention.expansion: Additional retouched images beyond the base package; other portrait services (family, events, weddings)
retention.churnRisk: High — single-session model with no built-in follow-up cadence; past clients easily forget the brand when they next need headshots

lifecycleGaps: No welcome or onboarding email sequence after inquiry/booking
No lead-magnet or nurture sequence to convert cold prospects
No pre-session booking reminders or preparation tips
No post-session follow-up to deliver value, request reviews, or upsell
No win-back campaign for past clients (career milestones, annual update prompts)
No referral or advocacy program despite strong 5-star review base
toneVoice: Warm, encouraging, and confidence-building; conversational yet professional; speaks to everyday professionals (not just models or executives); emphasizes value, ease, and the guarantee of a great result
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM compliance required; no special regulatory constraints (not healthcare, finance, or legal vertical)
